task_completion.description: Visit the Tor check API to get the exit IP address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A browser tab open to 'https://check.torproject.org/api/ip' displaying a JSON response with an IP address.

task_completion.description: Visit the Tor check website to verify connection status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A browser tab open to 'https://check.torproject.org/' showing a message indicating whether the browser is configured to use Tor.

task_completion.description: Check the browser's SOCKS proxy settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A browser settings page, connection settings dialog, or 'about:config' page showing 'network.proxy.socks' and 'network.proxy.socks_port' values.

task_completion.description: Check the browser application name and version.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'About' dialog box, 'about:support' page, or similar screen displaying the browser's name and version number.

task_completion.description: Bookmark the Tor check website with the specified title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A bookmark dialog or bookmark manager showing 'https://check.torproject.org/' being saved with the title 'Tor Connection Verifier'.

task_completion.description: Compile and save the structured plain-text report with all required labels and data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing a file saved at '/home/ga/Documents/anonymity-verification.txt' containing the labels: 'Exit IP', 'Tor Status', 'SOCKS Proxy' (formatted as host:port), 'Browser', 'Version', and 'Verification URL' (https://check.torproject.org/), populated with the gathered data.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical web browser to visit the URLs and check settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a GUI web browser (like Tor Browser or Firefox) being used, rather than terminal commands like 'curl' or 'wget'.

integrity.description: The data in the report matches the information gathered from the browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The IP address, Tor status, proxy settings, and browser version in the text report exactly match the values seen in the browser tabs and settings screens.

integrity.description: The agent used a text editor to create the report file.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor application (like gedit, mousepad, or nano in a terminal) is visible being used to write and save the report.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The report must be saved exactly at '/home/ga/Documents/anonymity-verification.txt'. The agent must visit both 'check.torproject.org' and 'check.torproject.org/api/ip'. A bookmark must be created for a URL containing 'check.torproject.org' with the exact title 'Tor Connection Verifier'.
